page.title: Hedge
page.subtitle: Lock the C leg on un-fixed commodity sales before the price moves

summary.exposureSub: open commodity reservations at the live C
summary.kgSub: green kg exposed to the C

reserveNote: Reserve lots are excluded. Only the commodity C leg can be hedged.

card.noMark: No C mark for this month. Exposure is unknown until one is entered.

empty.title: Nothing to hedge
empty.description: Every accepted commodity sale already has its C leg locked. Reserve lots are priced outright and never appear here.

lock.warning: This is irreversible. It locks the C leg at the live mark and cannot be undone.
lock.noMark: No live C mark for this month yet. Enter today's mark before locking.
lock.pendingId: This sale's quote reference is not available yet, so it cannot be locked from here. Lock it from the quote once the reference lands.
lock.error: Could not lock the fixation. Check the entry and try again.
